name: @cassida/swc-plugin
description: Cassida SWC plugin (WASM). Detects cas() chains in JSX spreads and emits an Op[] IR for the @cassida/next-plugin loader to compile against @cassida/compiler. Phase 1 scaffold — no-op transform. Private until the transform is filled in.

scripts.build: cargo build -p cassida_swc_plugin --release --target wasm32-wasip1 && cargo build -p cassida_swc_plugin_next --release --target wasm32-wasip1 && mkdir -p dist && cp ../../target/wasm32-wasip1/release/cassida_swc_plugin.wasm dist/ && cp ../../target/wasm32-wasip1/release/cassida_swc_plugin_next.wasm dist/cassida_swc_plugin.next.wasm
scripts.test: cargo test -p cassida_swc_plugin && cargo test -p cassida_swc_plugin_next
